libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runtime execution of 5.0.1, set runtime system properties equivalent to: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1/ephemeral port for WebClient requests; no external network service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient references the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless that dependency is deliberately added.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification on the target JDK remain authoritative for whether the Netty unsafe-access properties are sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.2.Final; the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access system properties for Java 25 native-image runs.
